worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Thank you, Isabella! Your identity has been verified successfully. Now let me go through your transactions and reward calculations.

I've pulled all your data. Let me analyze each card's rewards systematically.

---

**Here's a summary of the cards and what I found:**

## 1️⃣ Diamond Elite Card (Personal)
- **Expected rate**: 5% cash back on all purchases (5 points per dollar)
- ✅ All transactions appear correct — the math checks out.

## 2️⃣ EcoCard (Personal)
- **Expected**: 5 points/$ on Green, 1 point/$ on other purchases
- ❌ **Patagonia** ($187.45 - Green) — Got 562 pts (3%), expected ~937 pts (5%). **Too low!**
- ❌ **REI Co-op** ($234.56 - Green) — Got 234 pts (1%), expected ~1,172 pts (5%). **Too low!**
- ❌ **ThredUp** ($78.34 - Green) — Got 391 pts (5%), but ThredUp is an excluded merchant — should be 78 pts (1%). **Too high!**
- ❌ **Target - Eco Collection** ($145.67 - Green) — Got 728 pts (5%), but Target is excluded — should be 145 pts (1%). **Too high!**

## 3️⃣ Business Platinum Rewards Card
- **Expected**: 4% on Travel/Software/Media, 1.5% on others
- ❌ **Google Ads** ($1,250.00 - Media) — Got 1,875 pts (1.5%), expected ~5,000 pts (4%). **Too low!**
- ❌ **Facebook Ads** ($875.33 - Media) — Got 8,753 pts (10%), expected ~3,501 pts (4%). **Too high!**

## 4️⃣ Business Silver Rewards Card
- **Expected**: 10% on Travel/Software, 1% on others (promo expired 12/10/2024)
- ❌ **Southwest Airlines** ($412.78 - Travel) — Got 1,651 pts (4%), expected ~4,127 pts (10%). **Too low!**
- ❌ **Marriott Bonvoy** ($534.21 - Travel) — Got 10,684 pts (20%), expected ~5,342 pts (10%). **Too high!**
- ❌ **Datadog** ($387.00 - Software) — Got 387 pts (1%), expected ~3,870 pts (10%). **Too low!**
